content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Word Break". Refer to LeetCode description: N/A
constraints: s and wordDict[i] consist of lowercase English letters.
content.inputFormat: The input is a string s and a dictionary of strings wordDict. The string s is given on one line and the dictionary wordDict is given on the next line as a list of strings separated by spaces.
content.outputFormat: The output is a boolean value indicating whether the string s can be segmented into words from the wordDict.

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to solve the problem. Create a boolean array dp where dp[i] is true if the string s can be segmented into words from the wordDict up to index i.
